name: social-media-captions
description: Create five platform-native social media captions — one each for LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, Facebook, and TikTok — from a single topic or content piece.
input_description: Topic, key insight, or content piece to repurpose, plus optional brand voice notes (casual, professional, edgy, etc.).
output_description: Five distinct captions tailored to each platform's audience, character limits, and content conventions, with relevant hashtags and CTAs.
